root_text.an8.38:1.1: “Sappuriso, bhikkhave, kule jāyamāno bahuno janassa atthāya hitāya sukhāya hoti—
root_text.an8.38:1.2: mātāpitūnaṁ atthāya hitāya sukhāya hoti, puttadārassa atthāya hitāya sukhāya hoti, dāsakammakaraporisassa atthāya hitāya sukhāya hoti, mittāmaccānaṁ atthāya hitāya sukhāya hoti, pubbapetānaṁ atthāya hitāya sukhāya hoti, rañño atthāya hitāya sukhāya hoti, devatānaṁ atthāya hitāya sukhāya hoti, samaṇabrāhmaṇānaṁ atthāya hitāya sukhāya hoti.
root_text.an8.38:2.1: Seyyathāpi, bhikkhave, mahāmegho sabbasassāni sampādento bahuno janassa atthāya hitāya sukhāya hoti;
root_text.an8.38:2.2: evamevaṁ kho, bhikkhave, sappuriso kule jāyamāno bahuno janassa atthāya hitāya sukhāya hoti—
root_text.an8.38:2.3: mātāpitūnaṁ atthāya hitāya sukhāya hoti, puttadārassa atthāya hitāya sukhāya hoti, dāsakammakaraporisassa atthāya hitāya sukhāya hoti, mittāmaccānaṁ atthāya hitāya sukhāya hoti, pubbapetānaṁ atthāya hitāya sukhāya hoti, rañño atthāya hitāya sukhāya hoti, devatānaṁ atthāya hitāya sukhāya hoti, samaṇabrāhmaṇānaṁ atthāya hitāya sukhāya hotīti.

translation_text.an8.38:1.1: “Mendicants, a true person is born in a family for the benefit, welfare, and happiness of the people.
translation_text.an8.38:1.2: For the benefit, welfare, and happiness of mother and father; children and partners; bondservants, workers, and staff; friends and colleagues; departed ancestors; the king; the deities; and ascetics and brahmins.
translation_text.an8.38:2.1: It’s like a great rain cloud, which nourishes all the crops for the benefit, welfare, and happiness of the people.
translation_text.an8.38:2.2: In the same way, a true person is born in a family for the benefit, welfare, and happiness of the people. …
translation_text.an8.38:3.1: A wise person living at home
translation_text.an8.38:3.3: Neither by day or at night do they neglect
translation_text.an8.38:4.1: They venerate them in accord with the teaching,
translation_text.an8.38:4.3: One of settled faith and good nature
translation_text.an8.38:5.3: Good for the king, good for the gods,
translation_text.an8.38:5.4: and good for relatives and comrades.
translation_text.an8.38:6.1: In fact, they’re good for everyone,
translation_text.an8.38:6.2: well grounded in the true teaching.
translation_text.an8.38:6.3: Rid of the stain of stinginess,
translation_text.an8.38:6.4: they’ll enjoy a world of grace.”

variant_text.an8.38:5.2: dhamme ca pesalo → dhammedhapesale (bj); dhamme ca pesale (mr)
variant_text.an8.38:6.1: Sabbesaṁ → sabbesu (mr) | so → sa (sya-all, pts1ed, mr)
